---
name: Public comment
about: Propose a change to the specification
title: "[Comment] "
labels: public-comment
assignees: ''
---

**Section**
Which section would change? (e.g., §05 ATP)

**Current text**
Paste the current text.

**Proposed change**
Your proposed new text.

**Rationale**
Why should this change be made? Include any standards references.

**Impact**
Does this change affect existing implementations? Is it backward-compatible?
